title: Oxyanthe phragmites
benefits: Oxyanthe phragmites, commonly known as the sweet-scented grass, has been used in traditional medicine for its various health benefits. It is believed to have anti-inflammatory properties, which may help in reducing swelling and pain in the body. The plant is also said to possess antibacterial and antifungal properties, making it effective in treating infections and wounds. Additionally, it is used to treat digestive issues and to lower blood sugar levels. More research is needed to confirm the extent of its health benefits.
